title: gptimage-2 joins the model roster
summary:
OpenAI's gptimage-2 model is now live on the API, alongside some much-needed clarity for upstream error codes.

OpenAI's gptimage-2 is now wired up and available on the image generation API. Routed through Azure, ready for prompts, and as always, zero markup.

Azure occasionally blocks image requests. Previously, this threw a 403, making it look like you messed up your auth. We now remap this to a 502 Bad Gateway, correctly pointing the finger at the upstream provider where it belongs.
